subcodes.first_line: He hath commanded all to enter into His presence and turn towards the Throne of Manifestation, yet when the Day of God dawned, all turned away [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انه امر الکل بالحضور و التوجه الی عرش الظهور و اذا طلع یوم الله اعرض عنه کل
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @suffering and imprisonment, @consolation and comfort, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
